title: Increase board connection to dashboard limitation
excerpt: We’re limited to connecting only 60 boards to a dashboard. With a team of 15, we usually have hundreds of active boards at one time. In order to accurately report on all of these items we need to be able to connect all a…

posts.author: RHSM (Stacie de Jongh)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re limited to connecting only 60 boards to a dashboard. With a team of 15, we usually have hundreds of active boards at one time. In order to accurately report on all of these items we need to be able to connect all active boards to a dashboard. Please increase this number!

posts.author: Simon_Loge (Simon Logé)
posts.cookedHtml: did you find a solution to this? struggling with the same things right now

posts.author: MikeB_Axanexa (Mike Buckiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey There!

That is an architectural design as the more boards, the slower it runs.

If you are looking for a solution to roll up certain data to a high board and then project to a dashboard we have done many variations through simple integrations and they run a lot faster!

Let us know if we can help and reach out!

Mike B
Automation Architect
AXANEXA

posts.author: erinsoftr (Erin)
posts.cookedHtml: @RHSM Softr is a no-code app builder that integrates with monday.com, and could be a potential solution for your dashboard limitation. It allows you to display data from multiple monday.com boards in one spot, without board limits. More info here
